title: An Ordinance Authorizing the Annual Budget of the Municipal Government of Los Baños for Fiscal Year 2023 in the Amount of Four Hundred Million Eight Hundred Nine Thousand Four Hundred Fifty- Six Pesos and 00/100 ( P 400,809,456.00) Covering the Various Expenditures of the General Fund Proper and Two (2) Special Accounts Specifically for Market Operation Amounting to Nine Million Three Hundred Thirty Eight Thousand Four Hundred Ninety-five Pesos and 32 /100 (P 9,338,495.32) an
